title: lithospermum flavescens
intro: Lithospermum flavescens, also known as yellow gypsumwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum flavescens include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
